strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own end-to-end projects from backend services to UI and DevOps infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) and responsibilities suggest senior-level experience, conflicting with entry-level role expectations
Limited evidence of direct experience with PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy/construction tech domains
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in relevant technologies and a strong track record of shipping complex systems, but their senior-level experience and lack of domain alignment with renewable energy, combined with limited German proficiency, raise questions about fit for an entry-level, on-site role in Berlin.
